notes: Ranked + match fixes. Fixed getting stuck on 'Connecting' when you requeue right after a match (rooms now close properly). Added a Surrender button to the in-match menu, and leaving to the main menu mid-match now counts as a surrender (your opponent gets the win, and it's recorded). Blocker shield redesigned: bigger, centered above the card with a soft glow, and it now shows a red X (glow off) when a card's block is cancelled (e.g. Limejuice) or when an unblockable attack is coming. Card fixes: Uta and the other 'costs less in your hand when a condition is met' cards now actually get their discount (e.g. Uta with a 10000-power Character out); block-cancel no longer wrongly turns off the rest of a character's effects. Removed the manual rest option — characters only rest from attacking or card effects now.
